english: Turn Body and Left Heel Kick
visual: Pivots on the supporting leg, arms cross at the chest, then extends the left leg forward heel-first as the arms open wide.
motion_description: The body pivots 180 degrees counter-clockwise, settling all weight onto a slightly bent right leg. Both arms sweep inward to cross in front of the chest with palms facing upward, while the left knee continuously rises to waist level. In a slow, deliberate flow, the left leg extends straight out, leading with the flexed heel, concurrently as both arms open outward to the sides, finishing at shoulder height with palms pushing away.
